---
title: "Accessing The Agent Builder App"
---

---
title: "Accessing the Agent Builder App"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Agent-Builder/xqi1749732476753"
section: "Hyland Agent Builder"
---

Access Agent Builder from the Platform Home Portal.

From the Platform Home, under Applications, click on Agent Builder Studio.

The Agent Builder app is displayed.

![](data:image/gif;base64,)
